target.slice: SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag tab layout
target.writeBoundary: layout-only resource coordinate change; logic changes forbidden

userConfirmedIntent.summary: Align the Tag Param and Active Param edit control left edges with their header text left edges inside the SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag tabs.
includedBehavior: Move Tag Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Tag Param label left edge.
Move Active Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Active Param label left edge.
Apply the same layout adjustment to SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag dialogs.
excludedBehavior: No unrelated model or module changes.

observedAnchors.meaning: SMART-52 Laminator Tag tab owns Tag Param and Active Param edit control layout.
SMART-51 Laminator Tag tab owns the same Tag Param and Active Param edit control layout.

observedAnchors.anchor: Tag Param label x=111 width=66; edit controls originally x=129 width=45, then trial-adjusted to x=122
observedAnchors.meaning: The Tag Param edit column should left-align to the header label at x=111.

observedAnchors.anchor: Active Param label x=194 width=72; edit controls originally x=221 width=45, then trial-adjusted to x=208
observedAnchors.meaning: The Active Param edit column should left-align to the header label at x=194.

candidateMatch.recommendedShape: Move only the existing edit controls: Tag Param x 129 -> 111 and Active Param x 221 -> 194 in both SMART-51 and SMART-52 Tag dialogs.
candidateMatch.whyThisShape: It left-aligns the edit controls with their existing header labels without changing labels, IDs, styles, resource IDs, or logic.
risksIfWrong: Changing C++ code would violate the user's logic-free layout intent.
Changing only one model would leave SMART-51 and SMART-52 visually inconsistent.
Changing labels or widths could introduce broader visual churn than requested.

implementationPlan.expectedFlow: Resource-only coordinate adjustment for Tag Param and Active Param edit controls in two Laminator Tag dialogs.
nonGoals: No logic, read/write, save/load, or hardware behavior change.

forbiddenFlows.reason: The user explicitly allowed only layout modification and forbade logic changes.
The request is visual alignment only.
No new controls or IDs are needed for a coordinate-only alignment fix.
Hardware validation is not required for a resource-only layout adjustment.

build.summary: CardPrinterConfig Release_Factory Win32 build passed after the resource coordinate change.

runtime.summary: User confirmed the SMART-51/52 Laminator Tag tab edit control left alignment is OK.

hardware.summary: No hardware validation is required because no device communication or logic path changed.

remainingRisks: Version/release note update was not performed yet; decide during finalization if this layout change will be kept for release.
The build-generated .res artifact was restored so only the source resource file remains modified.
nextAllowedActions: Optionally update version/release notes before release.
Commit only after explicit user request.
